# MCP Catalog ‚Äî knowledge

## fact
- [MCP catalog competitive landscape (July 2026)](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/fact-mcp-catalog-competitive-landscape.md) ‚Äî Refreshed landscape ‚Äî incumbents' moves (Docker OCI catalogs, Databricks Unity AI Gateway, ToolHive coopetition) plus five new enterprise entrants (AWS, Google, IBM, Salesforce/MuleSoft, Kong); the governance differentiator is eroding, the integrated-chain card still holds.
- [MCP Catalog ‚Äî overview](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/fact-mcp-catalog-overview.md) ‚Äî The MCP server storefront in RHOAI ‚Äî what it is, the discover‚Üídeploy‚Üíconnect‚Üíconsume chain, roadmap (DP 3.4 shipped ‚Üí TP 3.6 EA1 ‚Üí GA 3.6 Stable, Nov 2026), tiers, and key links.
- [MCP upstream status ‚Äî registry, governance, spec (July 2026)](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/fact-mcp-upstream-status.md) ‚Äî Official registry is big but immature (‚â•36K records, still preview/v0.1); MCP governed by the Linux Foundation's AAIF since Dec 2025; largest-ever spec revision finalizes 2026-07-28 (stateless HTTP); upstream expects vendor catalogs to federate as subregistries.

## question
- [Is Kubeflow Hub's MCP Catalog the RHOAI MCP Catalog's upstream?](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/question-kubeflow-hub-catalog-alignment.md) ‚Äî Hub (RH-driven) shipped MCP Catalog v1alpha1 in Feb 2026; timing and stewardship suggest it is the RHOAI catalog's upstream implementation, but no doc states the relationship ‚Äî confirm and document.
- [Should the RHOAI MCP Catalog federate with the official MCP registry?](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/question-official-registry-federation.md) ‚Äî Upstream expects vendor catalogs to act as subregistries (OpenAPI spec + namespaced _meta) or aggregators; RH has no stated posture ‚Äî a TP-window (3.6 EA1) decision.
- [What spec-version compatibility policy does the catalog certify at GA?](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/question-spec-version-policy-ga.md) ‚Äî The largest-ever MCP revision finalizes 2026-07-28 (stateless HTTP, handshake removed); catalog GA (Nov 2026) certifies servers ~4 months later with no stated 2025-11-25 vs 2026-07-28 compatibility matrix.

## reference
- [kubeflow/hub (GitHub) ‚Äî MCP Catalog upstream (likely)](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/ref-kubeflow-hub-repo.md) ‚Äî Kubeflow Hub (formerly model-registry; README ‚Äî "Red Hat drives the project's development") shipped an MCP Catalog (v1alpha1 endpoints, McpServer/McpTool entities) in Feb 2026 ‚Äî the likely upstream implementation of the RHOAI MCP Catalog.
- [kubeflow/mcp-server (GitHub)](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/ref-kubeflow-mcp-server-repo.md) ‚Äî Kubeflow MCP Server (KEP-936, Apache-2.0, pre-release) ‚Äî exposes Kubeflow Trainer operations as MCP tools; verified unrelated to catalog/registry work ‚Äî a catalog-entry candidate, not the catalog's upstream.
- [MCP Catalog STRAT Jiras (umbrella RHAISTRAT-1339)](/features/mcp-catalog/knowledge/ref-mcp-catalog-strat-jiras.md) ‚Äî The RHAISTRAT umbrella and known catalog STRATs ‚Äî 1084/1306/1149 from the 3.4 DP cycle, 1859/1994 for 3.6; full enumeration pending the Jira hub skills.
